results.title: How this Indian-origin MIT engineer built an 8,000-crore company from missed calls!
results.description: Apurva Shrivastava, an engineer from MIT, has successfully created a company valued at an astonishing 8,300 crore rupees. His innovative startup, Avoca, harnesses the power of AI voice agents to streamline communication for home service businesses, enhancing appointment scheduling and quote follow-ups. With over $125 million raised, Avoca's valuation has reached $1 billion. Shrivastava forecasts a transformative impact of AI on the home services sector in the near future.

results.title: What Led To Sohail Khan And Seema Sajdeh's Divorce? Tubelight Actor Reveals
results.description: Sohail Khan opened up about his divorce from Seema Sajdeh on The Alliance, admitting his behaviour and career struggles affected their marriage.

results.title: Mayank Lohar Murder: Father Seeks Fast-Track Trial, Death Penalty For Accused
results.description: The victim's father has written to Maharashtra's top leadership, urging that the murder case be heard in a special fast-track court and seeking capital punishment for the accused arrested in the June 23 incident.

results.title: 4.5 magnitude earthquake in Bay of Bengal triggers tremors in Visakhapatnam
results.description: A 4.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Bay of Bengal early on Sunday, triggering mild tremors in Visakhapatnam and parts of Anakapalli, Vizianagaram, Kakinada and Konaseema districts in Andhra Pradesh. According to the National Center for Seismology, the quake occurred at 5:05 a.m.
